notes: This file is the central Infinity.lean infrastructure module: it algebraically defines ordAtInfty via the algebra norm intDegree, proves the classical values ord(x)=-2, ord(y)=-3, the non-archimedean inequality, algebraic Liouville, Bezout-finiteness (Silverman II.1.2 D-004), and packages ordAtInfty as a multiplicative Valuation. It is heavily imported (23+ downstream files). The longest proof (ordAtInfty_basis_fracPolyX_of_both_ne_zero, 152 lines) is the FractionRing-coefficient non-archimedean min formula, which reduces to the polynomial case via IsLocalization.surj witnesses.
